final:
module binary_down_counter_4 
(
  input rst,
  input clk,
  
  output reg [3:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) 
	begin
      count <= 4'b1111;
    end 
	else 
	begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
